name: Kosode-no-Te
combo4: When HP is below 30%, gain a shield that can absorb 10% of lost HP

name: Pearl
combo4: When healing, creates an undispellable shield that can absorb damage equal to 30% of the healing, lasts for 2 turns.

name: Dice Sprite
name_jp: 骰子の鬼 / Saikoro no oni
combo4: When resisting, launches a counter-attack at the source. Damage for the counter-attack is increased by 50%. Move bar is increased by 25% when inflicted with a control effect.

name: Suzume
combo4: When landing critical hits has 100% chance to push enemy move bar by 30%

name: Aosaginohi​
combo4: When KO'd, all allies are healed by 20% of the equipper's max HP

name: Sea Sprite
combo4: Grants all allies with a 30pxshield that can absorb damage equal to 10% of the eqipper's HP at the start of battle.

name: Temptress
combo4: When dealing damage has a 25% base chance to inflict 30pxconfuse on the target, lasts for 1 turn.

name: Youtou
combo4: When dealing damage, there is a 20% chance to do 40% additional damage.

name: Seductress
combo4: When dealing crit attacks, has a 40% chance to deal extra damage equal to 10% of the target's max HP. Cannot exceed 120% of the equipper's attack.

name: Snow Spirit
combo4: When dealing damage, has a 15% base chance (chance increases to 30% if target has Slow) to inflict targets with Freeze when dealing damage, lasts for 1 turn. When attacked, decreases attacker’s 30pxSPD by 30, lasts for 1 turn.

name: Jizo Statue
name_jp: 地蔵の像 / Jizō no Zō
combo4: When receiving a crit attack, gain a 30pxshield that can absorb 10% of damage received and has 30% chance to grant random allies shields, chance to trigger is lowered by 60% against taunted targets.

name: Nightwing
name_jp: 蝙蝠の翼 / Kōmori no Tsubasa
combo4: When dealing damage, gain 20% HP Steal.

name: Holy Flame
name_cn: 涅槃之火 / Nièpán zhī huǒ
name_jp: 再生の火 / Saisei no hi
combo4: At the end of turn, if HP is below 30%, 15% of max HP will be restored.

name: Samisen
combo4: When an ally is inflicted with a control effect, the equipper's 30pxspeed is increased by 30, lasts for 2 turns. Cannot be dispelled, max of 2 layers.

name: Mimic
name_cn: 魍魉之匣 / Wǎng liǎng zhī xiá
name_jp: 魍魎の匣 / Mouryō no hako
combo4: When dealing damage has 25% base chance to inflict a daze, silence, 30px40% reduced healing or confuse.

name: Boroboroton
combo4: Received damage is decreased 30%.

name: Fortune Cat
combo4: Has a 50% chance to gain 2 onibi at the start of turn.

name: Shy Soul
combo4: When dealing damage has 23% base chance to inflict 30pxsleep on the target, lasts for 1 turn.

name: Soultaker
combo4: Has a 20% chance to gain a new turn at the end of turn.

name: Dawn Fairy
name_cn: 日女巳时 / Rì nǚ sìshí
combo4: When dealing damage has 20% chance to reduce target's action bar by 30%, chance is increased to 30% against targets with buff effects.

name: Mirror Lady
combo4: Has a 30% chance of reflecting 100% of damage received, chance decreases by 60% against 30pxtaunted targets.

name: Priestess
combo4: When dealing damage has a 10% chance of inflicting 30pxdaze on the target, lasts for 1 turn. If there are no enemies inflicted with Daze, chance increases to 20%.

name: Scarlet
combo4: Has a 35% chance to counter-attack with a normal attack after receiving damage, chance is decreased by 60% against 30pxtaunted targets.

name: Azure Basan
combo4: Gain 3 onibi at the start of a round.

name: House Imp
combo4: Increases damage by 45% when attacking a target inflicted with a control effect.

name: Watcher
combo4: Increases damage dealt by 10% for each 15% of target’s HP reduced.

name: Tree Spirit
combo4: All healing effects increase by 20% (increases by 50% instead if equipper's HP is below 20%).

name: Claws
combo4: When dealing damage, has a 50% chance to ignore 45% of target's defense.

name: Harpy
combo4: Gain 3 onibi upon KO'ing a target.

name: Fenikkusu
combo4: When a "non-monster target" is KO’d, restores the equipper's max HP by 20% and increases their 30pxdamage by 20% (up to 120%) until the end of battle.

name: Shadow
combo4: Increases damage by 40% against targets with more than 70% HP.

name: Tomb Guard
combo4: Increases 30pxcrit damage by 0.5% per 1% of HP lost.

name: Tree Nymph
combo4: Has a 25% chance to decrease target's onibi by 1 when an ally takes damage, chance decreases by 60% against 30pxtaunted targets. Effect does not stack with multiple hits.

name: Soul Edge
combo4: When an ally is attacked by a single target attack the equipper has a 50% chance of reducing the ally's received damage by 20% and sharing 40% of the remaining damage.

name: Senecio
combo4: When receiving damage, has 25% base chance to inflict the attacker with 30pxdaze, lasts for 1 turn. Chance is decreased by 60% against 30pxtaunted targets, if the equipper is attacked multiple times it will only activate once.

name: Kyoukotsu
combo4: When dealing damage, damage is increased by 8% damage per onibi currently have upon using a skill.

name: Yamabiko
combo4: When a control effect is successfully resisted, has a 50% chance to reflect the effect to the source and is guaranteed to inflict them with the resisted control effect.

name: Wisp
combo4: At the start of turn gain 1 stack of 30pxThought (increases resist by 15%), max of 3 stacks. An equal amount of Thought stacks are consumed first before onibi when using skills that require onibi.

name: Merrow
combo4: At the end of the turn, 1 random debuff will be dispelled from the equipper or an ally. If no damage is dealt on that turn, 2 additional random debuffs will also be dispelled.

name: Leviathan
combo4: At the start of battle, gain the 30pxLeviathan Force (increases damage dealt and damage reduction by 80%). For the equipper's first 8 turns of battle, Leviathan Force is temporarily 30pxsealed.

name: Conch Blower
combo4: At the start of turn, creates a 30pxShell Shield to block damage once. While Shell Shield is active, the equipper's damage dealt is increased by 25%.

name: Wispzoa
name_cn: 海月火玉 / Hǎi yuè huǒ yù
name_jp: 海月の火の玉 / Kurage no Hi no Tama
combo4: When there is enough onibi on the equipper's turn, their onibi using skills will consume 1 additional onibi and damage dealt will be increased by 40%.

name: Oracle
combo4: After taking damage, recovers HP by 10% of the damage received. Grants 30pxShell (max 1 stack) at the start of battle and before taking an action. When received damage exceeds 60% of own max HP, the damage will be reduced by 60% and Shell will be removed.

name: Tomb Robber
combo4: Grants 1 Tomb Fire stack at the end of the equipped unit's turn.

name: Possessor
combo4: Increases damage dealt by 20%. If it's dealt to the same target, increases the damage dealt by subsequent strikes by 40% and 60% respectively. Damage boost loops 20%, 40%, 60% for further strikes.

name: Tapper
combo4: Exclusive effect. / If the equipped unit's starting Crit is over 120%, reduces Crit DMG taken by non-summoned ally entities by 15%.

name: Echoer
combo4: Grants the equipped unit a 20% chance of Assisting.

name: Bell-Haunt
combo4: Exclusive effect. / When the equipped unit lands a controling effect on their turn, for each target, increases the 30pxdamage dealt by non-summoned ally entities by 5%, up to 40% for 2 turns (triggers only once for multiple hits on the same target.)

name: Dangler
combo4: Fills up the Orb Bar by an additional 1 slot and heals the HP of the non-summoned ally entity with the lowest proportion of HP by 700% of the equipped unit's DEF.

name: Mutodori
combo4: At the end of the turn, permanently increases 30px damage by 15%, up to 45%.

name: Chartbringer
combo4: Exclusive effect. When an ally is attacked, grants Chart Protection lasting 1 turn on them.

name: Kataha no Ashi
name_jp: 片叶の葦 / Kataha no Ashi
combo4: When current HP is at max, damage dealt is increased by 45%.

name: Chirizuka
combo4: When taking an action, damage dealt is increased by 25%. For each non-summoned ally there is of more than the enemy, 30pxdamage dealt is increased by an additional 4% (max of 45%).

name: Abura-akago
combo4: Exclusive effect. At the start of battle, gain 2 Spirit stacks. Each Spirit stack increases all allies' DEF by 8%. If an ally doesn't have enough onibi to use a special skill, an equal number of Spirit stacks can be consumed instead.

name: Nakiishi
combo4: When a non-summoned ally is KO'd, gain 30px30% of their initial ATK and DEF (max of 5 stacks and cannot exceed more the 150% of the equipper's initial stats).

name: Okuri-inu
name_jp: 夜送りの犬 / Yo'okuri no Inu
combo4: When the equipper is inflicted with a control effect for the first time, gain 1 Night Parade stack. Night Parade increases RES by 80%, max of 3 stacks. At the start of turn, and if the equipper is able to take an action, removes Night Parade effect.

name: Amefurikozo
combo4: When the equipper's HP goes below 30% for the first time, their max HP is decreased to 1 and they gain 3 Dew stacks. When receiving damage, consume 1 Dew stack and absorb all the damage.

name: The Mirror of Yata
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: Exclusive effect. When dealing damage during battle against monsters, inflicts 30pxScorching Radiance. Inflicting Scorching Radiance again removes it to increase damage by 20%

name: Feather Slash
name_cn: 天羽羽斩 / Tiān Yǔ Yǔ Zhǎn
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: Grants a 50 DEF-ignoring effect at the start of battle against monsters.

name: Prophecy Astrolabe
name_cn: 预言星盘 / Yùyán Xīng Pán
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: Exclusive effect. When using a skill in battle against monsters, increases the Onmyoji's 30pxCrit by 15% of the equipped unit's Crit.

name: Moonstone
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: Exclusive effect. While an allied summoned entity is present, the monsters' total Effect RES is reduced by 30% (not exceeding 50% of own initial RES).

name: Bond Weaver
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: At the start of battle and at the start of each own turn, gain Bond Guard. Bond Guard: Blocks 500 damage upon being attacked by a monster; removed after blocking damage equal to 300% of initial DEF.

name: Prosperity Arrow
type: Increases a random base stat: *ATK by 8% *HP by 8% *DEF by 16% *HIT by 8% *RES by 8% *Crit by 8%
combo2: Exclusive effect. When battling against monsters, after the turn ends, raises the Onmyoji's Move Bar by 10% (limited to once before the Onmyoji's turn begins).

name: Amanojaku
combo4: Each time an ally is KO'd, the equipper's damage dealt is increased by 30%. The effect stacks.

name: Aonyobo
combo4: When the equipper receives a lethal hit for the first time all buffs and debuffs will be removed, HP restored to 100% and become 30pxfrozen for 1 turn. While frozen, defense is increased by 100% and they become immune to debuffs. If the equipper survives the frozen status, HP is restored to 100% again. / Only triggers once per battle.

name: Enshyoujo
combo4: When inflicting a debuff, ignore 30% of target's resist.

name: Hyosube
combo4: At the end of turn gain 1 layer of a 30pxPiercing Arrow, each layer ignores 75 of target's defense when attacking. Max 3 layers.

name: Nuribotoke
combo4: Unique effect. / At the end of the equipper's turn, after they use a normal attack or are immobile, 30pxresist and 30pxdamage for all allies is increased by 15%. The effect is doubled for the equipper. Lasts for 2 turns.
